curation_notes: Patch commit e6fddca adds enableOrDisableExternalEntityParsing() in BaseXMLBuilder.java to explicitly enable/disable external-general-entities and external-parameter-entities on DocumentBuilderFactory. The createDocumentImpl and parseDocumentImpl methods in BaseXMLBuilder are the root cause (they create the factory without disabling external entities). XMLBuilder and XMLBuilder2 are subclasses whose create/parse methods delegate to those base methods, exposing the vulnerability through their public API. All three source files were modified in the patch (3 non-test files, not noisy). Vulnerability class xxe confirmed from CWE-611 and patch diff.
